landing.heroEnglish: Your mind, your identity. Talk anonymously, track your wellbeing, and reach professional support when you need it.

login.title: OTP login
login.subtitle: Enter your mobile number to continue securely.
login.phoneError: Enter a valid Indian mobile number beginning with +91.
login.error: We could not complete OTP login. Please try again.

onboard.title: Tell us what support should feel like
onboard.consentTerms: I agree to use MindBridge for wellness support.
onboard.consentHealth: I consent to encrypted storage of my wellness information.

dashboard.moodPrompt: A quick check-in helps MindBridge understand your week.

chat.crisis: If you may be in danger, call iCall 9152987821 now.
chat.empty: Start with anything. You can write in your own language.

voicePage.title: Voice chat
voicePage.body: Press and hold to record when voice service is connected.

journal.title: Private journal
journal.placeholder: Write what is on your mind.

appointment.title: Book appointment
appointment.complaint: What would you like help with?
appointment.consent: Share relevant wellness history with the doctor.

phq9.title: PHQ-9
phq9.instructions: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by the following problems?
questions: Little interest or pleasure in doing things
Feeling down, depressed, or hopeless
Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping too much
Feeling tired or having little energy
Poor appetite or overeating
Feeling bad about yourself, or that you are a failure
Trouble concentrating on things
Moving or speaking slowly, or being fidgety or restless
Thoughts that you would be better off dead or of hurting yourself

gad7.title: GAD-7
gad7.instructions: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by the following problems?
questions: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge
Not being able to stop or control worrying
Worrying too much about different things
Trouble relaxing
Being so restless that it is hard to sit still
Becoming easily annoyed or irritable
Feeling afraid as if something awful might happen

asrs.title: ASRS v1.1 Part A
asrs.instructions: How often have you had these experiences over the past six months?
questions: Trouble wrapping up final details once challenging parts are done
Difficulty getting things in order for a task requiring organization
Problems remembering appointments or obligations
Avoiding or delaying a task that requires a lot of thought
Fidgeting or squirming when sitting for a long time
Feeling overly active and compelled to do things

aq10.title: AQ-10
aq10.instructions: Choose the response that best describes you.
questions: I often notice small sounds when others do not
I usually concentrate more on the whole picture than small details
I find it easy to do more than one thing at once
If interrupted, I can switch back quickly
I find it easy to read between the lines
I know how to tell if someone listening to me is getting bored
I find it easy to work out what characters intend in stories
I like to collect information about categories of things
I find it easy to work out what someone is thinking or feeling from their face
I find it difficult to work out people's intentions

mdq.title: MDQ
mdq.instructions: Has there ever been a period when you were not your usual self and the following happened?
questions: You felt so good or hyper that others thought you were not your normal self
You were so irritable that you shouted at people or started fights
You felt much more self-confident than usual
You got much less sleep and did not really miss it
You were much more talkative or spoke faster
Thoughts raced through your head
You were so easily distracted that you had trouble concentrating
You had much more energy than usual
You were much more active or did many more things than usual
You were much more social or outgoing than usual
You were much more interested in sex than usual
You did things that were unusual for you or risky
Spending money got you or your family into trouble

community.title: Community support
community.body: Anonymous peer support spaces will appear here after moderation tools are enabled.
